# 🗺️ Monica Global Documentation Navigation

::: note Abstract
Welcome to the official documentation center of the `Monica` local vault ecosystem. This matrix serves as your rapid entry point across the core user guides, architectural frameworks, and technical development specifications of our software.
:::

## 🚀 01. Onboarding & Guides (Guide)

This section contains basic project overviews, global design philosophies, and day-to-day operational directions tailored for end users.

* **[📖 Project Introduction](/en/guide/intro)** \* *A local-first vault aggregating Bitwarden and KeePass. Full feature highlights, open-source credits, and asset notices.*
* **[🎯 Interface Overview](/en/guide/overview)** \* *Get up to speed with the core capability boundaries and UI wireframe layouts of the client and browser extensions.*
* **[📝 Quick Start](/en/guide/quickstart)** \* *Start from zero and get Monica running instantly.*

## 🛠️ 02. Developer & Technical Specifications (Developer Specifications)

Tailored specifically for open-source contributors, secondary developers, and power users auditing data privacy structures.

* **[📦 WebDAV Backup Format Specification](/en/reference/webdav-backup-specification)** \* *Demystifying cross-device sync streams! Explanations of standard `.zip` and binary `.enc.zip` archive structures, JSON schema fields, AES-256-GCM crypto streams, and cascading fallback recovery logic.*
* **[🔄 Local Storage & Encryption Tech Doc](/en/reference/android-storage-security)** \* *Technical implementation analysis covering local storage sandbox controls and low-level cryptographic schemas.*
